repo.name: blastjunior-website
repo.deploy_trigger_assumption: Cloudflare Pages likely deploys when GitHub branch receives a push

commit_policy.reason: commit allowed for system-governance changes only; push/deploy require autonomous deploy gates

production_route_iron_law.rule: GitHub is the source of truth. Cloudflare Pages is the deployment target. OpenClaw may modify local repository files only through guarded source-change lifecycle. No direct Cloudflare deploy unless emergency override is explicitly enabled.
production_route_iron_law.zh: GitHub 是源码真相源；Cloudflare Pages 是部署目标；OpenClaw 只能通过受控生命周期修改本地仓库，然后经 GitHub 触发 Cloudflare Pages 部署；不走直接 Cloudflare 上传，除非进入明确的紧急模式。
canonical_route: OpenClaw / learning-v2 modifies local repository files
Cloudflare Pages Git integration auto deploy
blocked_as_primary_route: Cloudflare API mutation as normal route
editing deployed site without GitHub source update
